title: GuidancePlanItem
description: One selected seed in a GuidancePlan. Carries the client's own seed reference, a generation action, and an opaque coarse priority. It intentionally has NO numeric score field and NO per-seed count: a per-seed count would be a near-continuous channel that leaks selection ordering. Generation volume is governed by the plan-level budget instead. additionalProperties is false so no signal can ride along.

seed_ref.description: A reference the client owns and resolves locally to content. The backend/SDK wire contract accepts any non-empty string up to 255 characters; the server never sees the underlying content.
